page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a-nps1.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor operating at a clock speed of 2.55 GHz. The instance is configured with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, utilizing a single thread per core allocation model. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates strong single-core CPU performance, with a stress-ng single-core score of 2696.78, placing it in the top 25%. Multi-core CPU performance falls within the average range, as indicated by a stress-ng multi-core score of 43140.1 and a PassMark CPU score of 36056.93. Memory performance is mixed; while the PassMark memory score is strong at 2867.41, large-block uncached memory write bandwidth is relatively weak at 19.13 GB/sec. Other operations, such as Redis SET operations at 30.51 million operations per second and static web serving throughput at 12.92 GB/sec, perform at average levels.

Given its dedicated core allocation and balanced 1:4 memory-to-vCPU ratio, this instance offers a stable resource profile for workloads requiring consistent CPU performance without hyperthreading interference. The lack of bundled local storage requires reliance on external network-attached storage, which should be factored into the overall infrastructure design. This configuration is suitable for general-purpose workloads, multi-threaded applications, database operations, and web serving environments that benefit from dedicated AMD EPYC execution units.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a-nps1.8xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring a dedicated AMD EPYC 7T83 processor with 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs at 2.55 GHz. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core, but lacks local storage and GPU hardware. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps. Benchmark data shows strong single-core CPU and memory performance, alongside average multi-core and database execution capabilities, though uncached large-block memory write speeds are a relative bottleneck. This resource profile makes the instance well-suited for general-purpose enterprise applications, web serving, and database operations requiring dedicated, non-shared physical execution resources.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a-nps1.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong single-core performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a-nps1.8xlarge features 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and KVM virtualization for general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 32-core AMD EPYC instance with balanced memory and strong single-core performance for consistent general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by AMD EPYC 7T83 processor with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs.
Equipped with 128 GB of RAM, offering a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio.
Delivers strong single-core CPU and memory benchmark performance.
Features 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth and KVM hypervisor virtualization.
Configured without local storage or GPU accelerators.
Suitable for general-purpose applications, web serving, and database workloads.
